candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current-asset component only, not the total.
Balancing line, not a reported total.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label.
Close cash measure, but less standard than the explicit cash and cash equivalents total.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities
candidates.why: Cash flow metric, not a balance-sheet cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the explicit cash balance first; included alternate label as lower-priority historical equivalent.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Balancing line, not a reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Clean current portion of long-term debt excluding leases; directly fits baseline STD definition.
Short-term borrowings/current notes payable; part of STD.
Candidate shortlist item matching short-term debt.
Could include lease liabilities and overlaps with cleaner component lines; less preferred.
Would be ideal if populated, but preview is blank and cleaner component lines exist.
Could be debt in some firms, but blank here and not needed given better lines.

variables.notes: R:c. Selected the minimal non-lease components for current debt. Avoided 'LT Liabilities due within 1 Year' because it likely includes leases, and avoided double counting against broader current borrowing totals.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.
Likely alternate label for tax liabilities in some years; semantically close to taxes payable.

variables.notes: Used exact payable label first; included 'Tax Debt' as a lower-priority alternate label for years where the payable line may be labeled differently.

candidates.why: Best reported balance-sheet line for property, plant and equipment under IFRS-style labeling.
Balancing line, not the preferred reported PPE total.
Wrong asset class.

variables.notes: Selected 'Tangible Assets' as the closest reported IFRS-style equivalent of total/net PPE.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities
candidates.why: Exact net cash flow from operating activities line; best match for OANCF.
Operating cash before interest/taxes; close but not the final net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Intermediate subtotal before working-capital changes, not OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash Generated from Operations - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not a reported cash flow metric.

final_choice.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the OANCF shortlist because it is the exact reported net operating cash flow line and is clearly superior to intermediate subtotals.
